channel.title: Codings on Nikhil Vemula
channel.description: Recent content in Codings on Nikhil Vemula

item.title: Number of sub arrays whose sum is K
item.description: Sub Array Continuous part of array. Number of sub arrays for array of length n is n*(n+1)/2 Example: [1, 2, 3] [1], [2], [3], [1,2], [2,3], [1,2,3] Approach 1 #include <iostream>#include <vector> using namespace std; int main() { vector<int> nums = {1, 2, 3, 4}; int lengthOfSubArrray = 1; int count = 0; while (lengthOfSubArrray <= nums.size()) { cout << "Sub array of length: " << lengthOfSubArrray << endl; for (int i=0; i < nums.
